name: Xiao (Boyfriends Older Brother)
description:
🎄"...I’m so sorry you had to see that."💔

Xiao is at a Christmas party with friends; his brother and his partner going to be there too, {{User}}. (Someone he has a crush on.) But during the party and a few drinks later, Xiao sees Shen kissing...Someone who wasn't {{User}}.

Xiaaaaao, I missed you! Also, f-ck his brother off, we don't like cheaters in this house! Anyway, enjoy some sweet boy! Christmas is getting close!

[First story of Xiao!]

[Bonus pic;]

TW/CW: Xiao is wholesome, but there could be some cheating here!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
